Blended (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $46,290,741Details
International Box Office $81,700,000
Worldwide Box Office $127,990,741
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $14,845,875
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,679,834
Total $20,525,709
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After a disastrous blind date, single parents Lauren and Jim agree on only one thing: they never want to see each other again. But when they each sign up separately for a fabulous family vacation with their kids, they are all stuck sharing a suite at a luxurious African safari resort for a week.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,284,031 (30.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.24 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,555 opening theaters/3,555 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $67,764,654

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 23rd, 2014 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: May 22nd, 2014 (Wide) (Germany)
May 22nd, 2014 (Wide) (Switzerland)
May 23rd, 2014 (Wide) (Austria)
May 28th, 2014 (Wide) (Egypt)
May 30th, 2014 (Wide) (India)
Video Release: August 26th, 2014 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude and sexual content, and language.

Running Time: 117 minutes

Synopsis

After a disastrous blind date, single parents Lauren and Jim agree on only one thing: they never want to see each other again. But when they each sign up separately for a fabulous family vacation with their kids, they are all stuck sharing a suite at a luxurious African safari resort for a week.
